about.title: About
about.subtitle: Full-stack developer. 15+ years in software. Now building AI automation.

bio.text: Full-stack developer with 15+ years of experience across banking systems, enterprise software, and modern web applications. I've built production systems for Skoda Auto's manufacturing line, accounting platforms for gaming terminals, insurance apps, and mobile food delivery apps — before fully moving into AI and automation. Today I help businesses cut manual work and scale faster using Next.js, Node.js, and AI tools like OpenAI, Anthropic, and n8n. You work directly with me — a senior developer, not a project manager or junior.

qa.q1: How did you end up in AI automation?
qa.a1: Started in banking systems back in 1999 — Delphi, PHP, payment terminals. Then web, then mobile, then full-stack. AI automation came naturally — after 15 years of building software you start seeing exactly which parts can be eliminated entirely.
qa.q2: What's the most interesting project you've implemented?
qa.a2: The Škoda Auto manufacturing line system was something — real-time data from the production floor, WebSockets, MQTT. But watching a Telegram bot qualify leads and save someone 3 hours a day is equally satisfying.
qa.q3: What do clients usually come to you with?
qa.a3: Everything from 'build me an app from scratch' to 'automate this one annoying thing we do manually every day.' CRM systems, mobile apps, backends, landing pages, AI bots — the full stack, from idea to production.
qa.q4: Why AI — is it just a trend?
qa.a4: Companies that automate now will operate with half the overhead of those that don't. We can add AI to what you already have — as a standalone feature. Or build a complete system from scratch: CRM, mobile app, backend, dashboard — and integrate AI where it delivers the most impact.

mission.title: What I Do
mission.text: I build automation systems that connect your tools, qualify your leads, and eliminate the repetitive tasks that slow your team down. From Telegram bots to full CRM platforms — practical, working software, built fast.

privacy.metaDescription: Learn how AI Automation Studio collects, uses, and protects your personal data.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy

intro.title: Introduction
intro.text: AI Automation Studio ('we', 'us', 'our') is committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and what rights you have under applicable law, including the GDPR.

dataCollection.title: What Data We Collect
dataCollection.text: We collect information you provide directly — such as your name, email address, company name, and message content when you fill out our contact form. We may also collect technical data such as your IP address, browser type, and pages visited through cookies and analytics tools.

dataUse.title: How We Use Your Data
dataUse.text: We use your data to respond to your enquiries, provide our services, and improve our website. We do not sell your personal data to third parties. We may send you service-related emails based on your consent or legitimate interest.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.text: We use necessary, analytics, and marketing cookies. Necessary cookies are required for the site to function. Analytics cookies help us understand visitor behaviour. Marketing cookies may be used to show relevant content. You can manage your cookie preferences at any time via our Cookie Settings page.

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Services
thirdParty.text: We use trusted third-party services including Google Analytics for website analytics and Resend for email delivery. These providers may process your data in accordance with their own privacy policies. We ensure all third parties offer appropriate data protection guarantees.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.text: Under the GDPR you have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data; to object to or restrict processing; and to data portability. To exercise any of these rights, please contact us using the details below. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.text: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or how we handle your data, please contact us by email. We will respond within 30 days.

telegramBot.title: Qualify leads 24/7 while you sleep
telegramBot.subtitle: An AI-powered Telegram bot that asks the right questions, scores your leads, and sends you instant notifications — fully automated.
telegramBot.ctaHint: No registration. Just open Telegram and write /start

steps.title: Client writes to your bot
steps.desc: Share your bot link anywhere — website, Instagram, business card. Client starts the conversation anytime.

steps.title: AI asks the right questions
steps.desc: The bot collects name, business need, budget, and email — naturally, in a conversation.

steps.title: You get an instant notification
steps.desc: Groq AI scores the lead as 🔥 hot, 🌡️ warm, or ❄️ cold and sends you a summary in Telegram — immediately.

benefits: Works 24/7 — no missed leads at night or on weekends
AI scoring — focus on hot leads first
Instant Telegram notification with full context
Every lead saved to your database + admin dashboard
Connects to your CRM, email, or any webhook
Works in any language your clients speak
telegramBot.ctaSubtitle: Book a free 30-minute call — we'll set it up together.
